page.title: Introduction
page.lead: Welcome to Skyguard JS, a minimalist framework written in TypeScript with no third-party dependencies.

whatIs.title: What is Skyguard JS?
whatIs.paragraph1: Skyguard JS is a strongly typed minimalist framework written in TypeScript with no third-party dependencies for applications running in the <mark class="docs-highlight">NodeJS</mark> runtime. It provides built-in features made with native NodeJS dependencies to avoid third-party packages and give you greater project control.
whatIs.paragraph2: Our philosophy is to provide a minimalist framework without third-party dependencies, to build APIs or server-side web applications.

cards.title: No Dependencies
cards.description: You only install the library and nothing else. This improves security, reduces bundle footprint, and avoids complex external validation chains.

cards.title: Strict Typing
cards.description: Because it is written in TypeScript, it provides strong typing to prevent future bugs that are common in plain JavaScript.

cards.title: Developer Experience
cards.description: Intuitive API inspired by Express and Fastify. Start building immediately with familiar patterns.

cards.title: Security
cards.description: Skyguard JS includes built-in security features such as CORS, CSRF protection, password hashing, and more.

callout.title: Ready to try it?
callout.suffix: to build your first server with this powerful framework.
